basic_details.job_title: Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 0 Guest Faculty Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 10 July 2026 at the Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya office with original documents and self-attested copies.

content_sections.heading: Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Guest Faculty posts is not specified in the notification, and the application process is through a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in the concerned subject from a recognized university with a minimum of 55% marks, along with a second class in their Bachelor's Degree.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for various Guest Faculty positions at Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Guest Faculty positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Dhenkanal Mahila Mahavidyalaya, Dhenkanal, Odisha.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Faculty positions will be as per Government Rules.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. When is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Faculty posts is scheduled to be held on 10 July 2026.
